zsh.c(3) Library Functions Manual zsh.c(3)

NAME

zsh.c - Zsh shell completion script generator with category grouping.

SYNOPSIS

Functions


asciichat_error_t completions_generate_zsh (FILE *output)

Detailed Description

Zsh shell completion script generator with category grouping.

Definition in file zsh.c.

Function Documentation

asciichat_error_t completions_generate_zsh (FILE * output)

Definition at line 135 of file zsh.c.

135                                                          {
136   if (!output) {
137     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Output stream cannot be NULL");
138   }
139 
140   fprintf(output, "#compdef _ascii_chat ascii-chat\n"
141 #ifndef NDEBUG
142                   "#compdef _ascii_chat build/bin/ascii-chat ./build/bin/ascii-chat\n"
143 #endif
144                   "# Zsh completion script for ascii-chat\n"
145                   "# Generated from options registry - DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY\n"
146                   "\n"
147                   "_ascii_chat() {\n"
148                   "  local curcontext=\"$curcontext\" state line modes\n"
149                   "  _arguments \\\n"
150                   "    '1:mode:->mode' \\\n"
151                   "    '*::args:_ascii_chat_args'\n"
152                   "  case $state in\n"
153                   "    mode)\n"
154                   "      local -a server_modes client_modes\n"
155                   "      server_modes=(\n");
156 
157   /* Generate server-like modes from registry */
158   size_t mode_server_count = 0;
159   const mode_descriptor_t *mode_server_descs = get_modes_by_group("server-like", &mode_server_count);
160   if (mode_server_descs) {
161     for (size_t i = 0; i < mode_server_count; i++) {
162       fprintf(output, "        '%s:%s'\n", mode_server_descs[i].name, mode_server_descs[i].description);
163     }
164     SAFE_FREE(mode_server_descs);
165   }
166 
167   fprintf(output, "      )\n"
168                   "      client_modes=(\n");
169 
170   /* Generate client-like modes from registry */
171   size_t mode_client_count = 0;
172   const mode_descriptor_t *mode_client_descs = get_modes_by_group("client-like", &mode_client_count);
173   if (mode_client_descs) {
174     for (size_t i = 0; i < mode_client_count; i++) {
175       fprintf(output, "        '%s:%s'\n", mode_client_descs[i].name, mode_client_descs[i].description);
176     }
177     SAFE_FREE(mode_client_descs);
178   }
179 
180   fprintf(output, "      )\n"
181                   "      _describe -t server-modes 'server-like modes' server_modes\n"
182                   "      _describe -t client-modes 'client-like modes' client_modes\n"
183                   "      ;;\n"
184                   "  esac\n"
185                   "}\n"
186                   "\n"
187                   "_ascii_chat_args() {\n"
188                   "  case $words[1] in\n"
189                   "    # Server-like modes\n"
190                   "    server)\n"
191                   "      _ascii_chat_server\n"
192                   "      ;;\n"
193                   "    discovery-service)\n"
194                   "      _ascii_chat_discovery_service\n"
195                   "      ;;\n"
196                   "\n"
197                   "    # Client-like modes\n"
198                   "    client)\n"
199                   "      _ascii_chat_client\n"
200                   "      ;;\n"
201                   "    mirror)\n"
202                   "      _ascii_chat_mirror\n"
203                   "      ;;\n"
204                   "\n"
205                   "    *)\n"
206                   "      # Binary-level options\n");
207 
208   /* Binary options - grouped by category */
209   size_t binary_count = 0;
210   const option_descriptor_t *binary_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_DISCOVERY, true, &binary_count);
211 
212   if (binary_opts) {
213     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, binary_opts, binary_count, "binary");
214     SAFE_FREE(binary_opts);
215   }
216 
217   fprintf(output, "      ;;\n"
218                   "  esac\n"
219                   "}\n"
220                   "\n"
221                   "# Server-like modes: handle incoming connections and stream management\n"
222                   "_ascii_chat_server() {\n");
223 
224   /* Server options - grouped by category */
225   size_t server_count = 0;
226   const option_descriptor_t *server_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_SERVER, false, &server_count);
227 
228   if (server_opts) {
229     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, server_opts, server_count, "server");
230     SAFE_FREE(server_opts);
231   }
232 
233   fprintf(output, "}\n"
234                   "\n"
235                   "_ascii_chat_discovery_service() {\n");
236 
237   /* Discovery-service options - grouped by category */
238   size_t discovery_svc_count = 0;
239   const option_descriptor_t *discovery_svc_opts =
240       options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_DISCOVERY_SERVICE, false, &discovery_svc_count);
241 
242   if (discovery_svc_opts) {
243     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, discovery_svc_opts, discovery_svc_count, "discovery_service");
244     SAFE_FREE(discovery_svc_opts);
245   }
246 
247   fprintf(output, "}\n"
248                   "\n"
249                   "# Client-like modes: connect to servers or render local media\n"
250                   "_ascii_chat_client() {\n");
251 
252   /* Client options - grouped by category */
253   size_t client_count = 0;
254   const option_descriptor_t *client_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_CLIENT, false, &client_count);
255 
256   if (client_opts) {
257     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, client_opts, client_count, "client");
258     SAFE_FREE(client_opts);
259   }
260 
261   fprintf(output, "}\n"
262                   "\n"
263                   "_ascii_chat_mirror() {\n");
264 
265   /* Mirror options - grouped by category */
266   size_t mirror_count = 0;
267   const option_descriptor_t *mirror_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_MIRROR, false, &mirror_count);
268 
269   if (mirror_opts) {
270     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, mirror_opts, mirror_count, "mirror");
271     SAFE_FREE(mirror_opts);
272   }
273 
274   fprintf(output, "}\n"
275                   "\n"
276                   "_ascii_chat \"$@\"\n");
277 
278   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
279 }




References get_modes_by_group(), and
    options_registry_get_for_display().


Referenced by completions_generate_for_shell().
